_license: Public Insure Our Future scorecard. Cite https://global.insure-our-future.com/scorecard/. Scorecard methodology + per-company scores are published under a free-to-cite policy.

environment.narrative: Insure Our Future 2024 scorecard: 2.3/10 (weak). Sub-scores: coal underwriting moderate; oil & gas underwriting weak. Chubb: 2022 oil-sands underwriting policy improved coal/oil sands position; oil and gas exclusions still lag European peers.

Insure Our Future 2024 scorecard: 1.5/10 (weak). Sub-scores: coal underwriting moderate; oil & gas underwriting very-weak. Liberty Mutual: 2020 coal phase-out targets but no meaningful oil and gas restrictions; remains a top US insurer of the fossil-fuel sector.

Insure Our Future 2024 scorecard: 1.1/10 (weak). Sub-scores: coal underwriting limited; oil & gas underwriting very-weak. Travelers: limited coal exclusions; no oil and gas underwriting restrictions; among the US insurers with the weakest climate policies.

Insure Our Future 2024 scorecard: 1.0/10 (weak). Sub-scores: coal underwriting limited; oil & gas underwriting very-weak. CNA Financial: minimal coal restrictions; no meaningful oil and gas exclusions.

Insure Our Future 2024 scorecard: 0.9/10 (weak). Sub-scores: coal underwriting very-weak; oil & gas underwriting very-weak. Everest Group: no coal or oil and gas underwriting restrictions disclosed; among the weakest re/insurer scorecard ranks.

Insure Our Future 2024 scorecard: 0.7/10 (very-weak). Sub-scores: coal underwriting very-weak; oil & gas underwriting very-weak. Markel: no fossil-fuel underwriting restrictions disclosed; bottom-tier on the scorecard.

Insure Our Future 2024 scorecard: 0.4/10 (very-weak). Sub-scores: coal underwriting very-weak; oil & gas underwriting very-weak. W. R. Berkley: among the lowest scorecard tiers — no public coal, oil, or gas underwriting restrictions; named as a landmark laggard.

Insure Our Future 2024 scorecard: 0.3/10 (very-weak). Sub-scores: coal underwriting very-weak; oil & gas underwriting very-weak. Berkshire Hathaway Reinsurance: lowest scorecard tier — no fossil-fuel exclusions; named as a landmark laggard for continued underwriting of new coal, oil, and gas.

Insure Our Future 2024 scorecard: 0.7/10 (very-weak). Sub-scores: coal underwriting very-weak; oil & gas underwriting very-weak. Allstate: minimal climate-related underwriting policy; no public fossil-fuel exclusions in the 2024 scorecard.

Insure Our Future 2024 scorecard: 0.5/10 (very-weak). Sub-scores: coal underwriting very-weak; oil & gas underwriting very-weak. Progressive: no public coal, oil, or gas underwriting restrictions disclosed in the 2024 scorecard.

Insure Our Future 2024 scorecard: 0.4/10 (very-weak). Sub-scores: coal underwriting very-weak; oil & gas underwriting very-weak. Brighthouse Financial: no public fossil-fuel exclusions in underwriting or investment portfolios.
